boundary: no panel entry proves TMUF runtime visibility before calibration smoke
local label maps prove atlas regions, not in-game seam quality
generated panel names provide token evidence only, not stock semantic truth beyond their local labels

center_spine.design_role: long center stripe, symmetry probe, and top-flow alignment
proof_notes: GBuffer centerline placement remains experimental until TMUF smoke

engine_rear_deck.design_role: rear deck louvers, glow blocks, technical vent rhythm, and symmetric rear highlights
proof_notes: generated panel names support only deck/rear token evidence
exact TMUF visual interpretation and louver placement remain experimental until smoke

front_mudguard_caps.design_role: front guard caps, edge highlights, and calibration-visible color checks
proof_notes: LEN/Z front split remains experimental until TMUF smoke

helmet_and_visor.design_role: driver color harmony and restrained glass/visor shading
geometry_constraints: named PSD helmet and glass zones only
proof_notes: helmet is visible local atlas evidence but should not drive main car identity

main_body_top_quadrants.design_role: large base fields, hard-edge blocks, long stripe clipping, and broad abstract panels
proof_notes: local atlas labels are proven; TMUF runtime visibility still requires calibration smoke

mirrors_and_holders.design_role: small contrast checks and polished micro-detail
proof_notes: small details can disappear in game; use for probe and restraint until visual acceptance

nose_identity_panel.design_role: front identity wedge, spear tip, and number-free badge field
proof_notes: local NosePart label is proven; front direction confirmation still belongs to smoke calibration

rear_mudguard_caps.design_role: rear guard caps, rear color echo, and wheel-arch rhythm
proof_notes: LEN/Z rear split remains experimental until TMUF smoke

side_wings.design_role: small aero flicks and secondary color hits
geometry_constraints: named PSD side wing zones only
proof_notes: local labels are proven; visibility and seam quality still require TMUF review

sidepod_blades.design_role: lower side sweeps, sponsor-like blank blocks, and side color returns
proof_notes: SideUnderColor labels are proven; 3D blade placement remains experimental until TMUF smoke

tailwing_bands.design_role: rear wing bands, edge trim, and high-contrast rear identity
proof_notes: tailwing labels are proven local atlas evidence; runtime visibility still requires smoke

underbody_dark.design_role: dark material continuity, low reflections, and non-hero shadow fields
geometry_constraints: named PSD underside and underplate zones only
proof_notes: use as support material; not a proof of wheel, tyre, Details.dds, or ProjShad behavior

front_nose_len_positive.evidence: LEN/Z positive end is front; front guards span Z about 1.548..2.045 and body/fixed reaches about 2.135.

high_low_surfaces_hgt.evidence: GBuffer axis_roles maps HGT to axis 1/Y, with mesh HGT span about 0.147..1.056.

left_right_sides_lat_sign.evidence: Local L components have positive X/LAT and local R components have negative X/LAT in OBJ bounds.

mudguards_by_name_and_label.evidence: Mudguard OBJs and psd_parts names separately identify guard surfaces.

rear_deck_candidate_len_negative_high_hg.evidence: Body/fixed reach LEN/Z about -1.770 and HGT/Y about 1.056; exact semantic rear deck is not named by mesh files.
